name: Braised Celery and Red Pepper
recipeIngredient: 1 small Sweet red pepper, cut into 1-inch squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large, heavy skillet over medium-high heat. Add the celery and cook, stirring occasionally, for 4 minutes.
2. Add red pepper, chicken broth, oregano, garlic, salt, and pepper. Reduce heat to low and cook, covered, for 6 minutes.
3. Increase the heat to medium-high and cook, uncovered, stirring occasionally, for 4 to 6 minutes, or until most of the liquid has evaporated and the vegetables are glazed.
4. Serve immediately.
